---
title: "practice"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-18"
# гҒҠгҒҹгӮҒгҒ—дҪңжҘӯз”Ё
---

# source
```{r}
source("preparation.R")
```


```{r}
table(
  df$district_w3, 
  df$v19_farming_intention_w3
) |> 
  as.data.frame.matrix()
```


```{r}
table(
  df$district_w3,
  df$v20_farming_type_w3
) |> 
  as.data.frame.matrix()
```


```{r}
table(
  df$v30_machine_loss_number_w3,
  df$v20_farming_type_w3
) |> 
  as.data.frame.matrix()
```

```{r}
table(
  df$v31_machine_available_number_w3,
  df$v20_farming_type_w3
) |> 
  as.data.frame.matrix()
```

```{r}
df |>
  group_by(district_w3) |>
  summarise(
    loss_mean =
      mean(v30_machine_loss_number_w3, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_loss =
      sum(!is.na(v30_machine_loss_number_w3)),
    available_mean =
      mean(v31_machine_available_number_w3, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_available =
      sum(!is.na(v31_machine_available_number_w3))
  )
```




```{r}

table(df$district_w2, df$member)
table(df$v9_farming_intention_w2, df$member)

```

# гғҮгғјгӮҝзөҗеҗҲз·ҙзҝ’

## гғҮгғјгӮҝиӘӯгҒҝиҫјгҒҝ
```{r}
df_id_name <- read_excel("data/data_id_name.xlsx")
dw1 <- read_excel("data/data_shichigawahama_w1.xlsx")
dw2 <- read_excel("data/data_shichigawahama_w2.xlsx")
dw3 <- read_excel("data/data_shichigawahama_w3.xlsx")
dw4 <- read_excel("data/data_shichigawahama_w4.xlsx")

```

## йҮҚиӨҮIDгҒҢгҒӘгҒ„гҒӢгғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜ
```{r}
df_id_name |> count(id) |> filter(n > 1)
dw1 |> count(id) |> filter(n > 1)
dw2 |> count(id) |> filter(n > 1)
dw3 |> count(id) |> filter(n > 1)
dw4 |> count(id) |> filter(n > 1)
```
## idгӮ’гӮӯгғјгҒ«гҒ—гҒҰгғҮгғјгӮҝзөҗеҗҲ
```{r}
df <- list(df_id_name, dw1, dw2, dw3, dw4) |> 
  reduce(full_join, by = "id")

df

```
